7662397.title: Tommy Noonan
7662397.extract: Tommy Noonan (born Thomas Patrick Noone; April 29, 1921 – April 24, 1968) was an American actor, comedian, screenwriter and producer. He acted in a number of high-profile films as well as B movies from the 1940s through the 1960s; he is best known for his supporting performances as Gus Esmond, wealthy fiancé of Lorelei Lee (Marilyn Monroe), in Gentlemen Prefer Blondes (1953), and as musician Danny McGuire in A Star Is Born (1954).
